hooks.command: bash -c 'cd /c/Users/honsf/DEVELOP/cadsmith/previewer && if powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Previewer already running on port 3000"; else npm run dev > /tmp/cadsmith-previewer.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 && echo "Previewer started on port 3000"; fi && if tailscale.exe serve status 2>&1 | grep -q 3000; then echo "Tailscale serve already active"; else tailscale.exe serve --bg 3000 2>&1 && echo "Tailscale serve started"; fi'
